titleStmt.title: SII 35.85: original edition by D. M. Nagaraju
No. 85. (A.R. No. 76 of 1952-53.) BYĀHAṬṬI, HUBLI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up near the Hirēmaṭha.
The damaged inscription is dated in Śaka 1130, Vibhava, Māgha, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkrānti. The date is irregular [A.D. 1209.]
It registers a grant of land and a house-site by one Daṇḍanāyaka (name not clear). It registers a gift of 4 mattars of land to god Kēśava and also gift of a house. Describes the learned persons.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmaracāravē trailōkyanagarāraṁbha
mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrī
prithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara dvārāvatīpuravarā
dhīśvara yādavakulāṁbaradyumaṇi samyaktvacoḍāmaṇi malerājarāja
maleparoḷu gaṁḍa gaṁḍabēruṁḍa kadanapracaṁḍa sanivārasiddhi giridurggama
lla caladaṁkarāma niśśaṁkapratāpacakravartti hoysaṇa vīraballāḷadēva vi
jayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhi pravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbara salu
ttamire . sarvvatrābhara gōtrara
ttahatvamā tadaśastadēva vīraballā
ḷa . vī
raballāḷadēvanripāḷa sudakṣa stā
si kautukaṁ . vīraballāḷadēvara pādapadmōpajīvi ma
hāpradhāna daṇḍādhipati bāhattaraniyōgādhipati nāḍagaṁḍa
peṁḍāraṁ śrī nātha śrī sumana ṣara
sa daṁḍanāyakaṁ mahīrāya kuladiṁ
di vilasatpuraratnabra kula tāranta
ti ḍanātha
gaṁḍapeṁḍāra varabiruda sa śrīmadda
ṇḍēśanu sutāra maṇīśanu
tikke samasta dharmma kanaṁ nāya
gōpacanapratima pratāpanaṁ . tō
ḷvaladoḷe cāḷukya sōmēśvara kaṭaka
tiya kaṭakadoḷe vaḷiya
ṇimaya mu
ṇantha
varggakke caṁdrā
kkamodavi
ragōpaṁ .
guṇavarṇnanavadeṁtane . śa
tari ba durggaṁ kuruca saḷa
ṭṭiyoḷaṁ . śime
ra besadinadhvānaṁ rabase dinadyāpanaḷi
yalu śakavarṣaṁ 1130 neya vibhava saṁvatsarada mā ḷī
vuttarāyaṇa saṁkrāṁti byatīpāta puṇyadinadalu parasa
daṁḍanāyaka vasatānya brahmapuriya mahājanaṁgaḷa vṛttigaḷa sa
rvva namasyaṁ dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍiyācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ koṭṭa mahājanaṁga
ḷa mahimeyeṁtene . svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamō
nānuṣṭhānajapasamādhiśīlaguṇasaṁpannarappa guvaladēva
tōmālajā tpuraru yājanādhya
yanādhyāpanadānaparigraha ṣaṭkarmmanirataruṁ śaṁkhacakragadādharapadmā
dharapādārādhakaru nayyāyaka lōkāyata śāṁkhya bauddha mīmāṁsakādya
nēka śāstrārtthanirṇnayaruṁ rugyajussāmātharvvaṇa grarumappa
śrīmadbeḷḷavaṭṭi brahmapuriya mahājanaṁgaḷu mattaṁ sīmeya
dentene . niguḍeya haḷḷadiṁ teṁkalu śrī kēśavadēvarige mattaru 4 [Ā]vṛttiyiṁ
mūḍalu vāmanabhaṭṭara śaṁkarabhaṭṭa vṛttiya paḍuvalu kāśyapagōtrada kēśavadē
vabhaṭṭōpādhyāyarige mattareraḍu . kāśyapagōtrada tribhuvanavidyācakra
vartti vaijanāthabhaṭṭōpādhyāyarige kiṟuvasuṟa dāriyiṁ baḍagalu matta
reraḍu . Agastyagōtrada divākarabhaṭṭōpādhyāyarige kiṟuvasuṟa dāri
yiṁ baḍagalu mattareraḍu . hāritagōtrada muddaṇabhaṭṭōpādhyāyarige ma
ttavā dāriyiṁ baḍagalu mattareraḍu . Ā vṛttiyiṁ baḍagalu kāśyapagō
trada śaṁkarabhaṭṭōpādhyāyarige mattareraḍu Ā vṛttiyiṁ mūḍalu kaśyapagōtrada
(da) purāṇada cavuḍarāyabhaṭṭōpādhyāyarige mattareraru . hoṟakōṭeyo
ḷage biṁgana bhāviyiṁ baḍagaṇa kēriyoḷage mane nālku Arabhāviyiṁdaṁ paḍu
valu nāgālavoṁdu mane sa(ga ?)ḷiya kōṭeya baḷiyalu baḍagavāgila maneyeraḍu .
yintī gṛhakṣētravellavakkaṁ cakravarttiyaṟiye sarvvabādhāparihāravāgi koṭṭaru .
Digital edition of SII 35.85 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
